raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Reviewing the section centrally involves assessing whether the stated contribution shifts coherently from DialogueDev to Reflective Subgoal Prompting.","R1.2":"The delegation makes logical consistency load-bearing because the section contains an argument chain about where performance gains originate.","R1.3":"The review should check whether the reported benchmark and issue-resolution numbers support the claims made from them.","R1.5":"Section-level review includes whether the narrative ordering and contribution framing are structurally coherent.","R1.6":"A general section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.","RX.1":"Any review projection must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks surrounding paper context.","RX.2":"The reviewer must avoid endorsing claims stronger than the section's reported evidence supports.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to reviewing this section rather than rewriting or evaluating the whole paper.","RX.4":"The review should avoid advice that could encourage misleading research claims or unsupported evaluation framing.","RX.5":"Review judgments should be traceable to the text and reported results in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: Reviewing the section centrally involves assessing whether the stated contribution shifts coherently from DialogueDev to Reflective Subgoal Prompting.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation makes logical consistency load-bearing because the section contains an argument chain about where performance gains originate.
rationale.R1.3: The review should check whether the reported benchmark and issue-resolution numbers support the claims made from them.
rationale.R1.5: Section-level review includes whether the narrative ordering and contribution framing are structurally coherent.
rationale.R1.6: A general section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any review projection must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks surrounding paper context.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer must avoid endorsing claims stronger than the section's reported evidence supports.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to reviewing this section rather than rewriting or evaluating the whole paper.
rationale.RX.4: The review should avoid advice that could encourage misleading research claims or unsupported evaluation framing.
rationale.RX.5: Review judgments should be traceable to the text and reported results in the provided artifact.
